div.p: Record yourself speaking on a topic. Faster-Whisper transcribes your words; Qwen suggests grammar fixes, better synonyms, and an improved version. Works in English, Ukrainian, Greek, and Polish.

textarea.placeholder: A topic will appear here, or type your own…
Your transcribed speech will appear here…

div.div: Nothing to fix — your speech looks good!
No practice yet. Record your first session to see it here.

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start flex-wrap gap-2 mb-3
